title: PlausiDen — blog
description: Notes on building a typed-substrate platform.

sections.title: Notes from the build.
sections.lede: Architectural decisions, post-mortems, and the occasional rant about static typing.

items.title: Loom catalogue: 132 typed primitives
items.body: T660 P5+P6 closed. 101 new variants across layout, editorial, marketing, media, commerce, social, forms, nav, feedback, game/forum/video — plus the auth + Crucible widget batch.

items.title: T98 closed — runtime CMS wiring
items.body: forge content / forge search / forge assets subcommands wired. 21 tests added, three new CLI families.

items.title: Why LFI gates AI, not generates it
items.body: The architectural inversion. Critic trait as compiler-enforced seam. Why bypass isn't a code-review policy.

items.title: OLED-true black on every theme
items.body: 13 themes share the same OKLCH palette. AMOLED variant has #000 bg + per-token contrast. Battery + readability.

items.title: Catching CVSS 4.0 in the supply chain
items.body: Two transitive deps flagged at the cargo-deny step. CVSS 4.0 vector format support landed at the same time.

items.title: SLSA-attested SBOMs, the silent way they fail
items.body: Our supply-chain CI was emitting zero SBOMs for weeks because the glob path mismatched cargo-cyclonedx's per-crate output. Fixed + hardened.

sections.heading: Get the build notes
sections.lede: One email a fortnight. No tracking pixels. We send from our own SMTP.

sections.title: Catch up with the build.
sections.lede: Every post traces a real architectural decision — what we tried, what didn't work, what shipped.
